storyInfo: Elena decides to stay in Kjerag for the holidays, and experiences an eventful day accompanied by a mysterious guide. A visitor is waiting for her when she returns to the observation station.

attributes.content: It's past midnight, again... gotta finish my report on Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I can't believe the day would come when I wrote the word 'Feranmut' in a report...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Oh, Director Muelsyse! What brings you here?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Well if it isn't Elena! I knew you'd still be here this late.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: You've spent an entire month cranking out reports since coming back to the station. You don't hafta push yourself so hard.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: It took forever just to put the data together. Then there were experiments I had to replicate in the lab to—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Science will survive you taking a couple days off, girl.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Speaking of which, the station's scheduled break starts tomorrow.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I think you applied to stay in Kjerag?
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I did...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Lemme guess—
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: D-Don't look at me like that! I know, I know, I won't use it to put in extra time.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I hardly ever left the station before the Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I did take a trip down the mountain after it happened, but as you know, it was... er... not exactly a sightseeing trip.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: That's one way to put it. Hehe...
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: That's why I wanted to take a good look around Kjerag during the break.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Now we're talkin'.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: I just popped in to remind you that every researcher choosing to stay in Kjerag gets a local volunteer guide, to help you settle into the place.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Yours is coming first thing in the morning. So hurry up and get to bed, don't wanna oversleep.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Alright... after I'm done with this one! I only have a few hundred words left.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Fine, fine, have it your way.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Make the most of tomorrow, Elena, and don't forget to try the fondue.
attributes.name: Muelsyse

attributes.content: Of course. I'm not missing it for anything this time!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It's you—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: What? You don't recognize me?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The young huntress brushes the snow off herself, while the Rift Cloudbeast yelps excitedly at Elena from her left shoulder.
(Whisper) It's okay, Rift Cloudbeast. Elena can be a bit dumb, but not dumb enough to forget us after just a few days.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Hey, I heard that!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...Never mind. The Director said a local guide would be coming to help me acclimate. Don't tell me—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Yeah, I'm your guide.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I was on my way to pick up my siblings when I saw the posters your people put up looking for volunteers, so I signed up.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The lady who did the interview was really excited. She said I was as local as it gets.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Well, you certainly look the part...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Okay... should we go and find Enya?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The Saintess can't go outside so easily. Besides, she must be busy with things at the Vine-Bead Court—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You don't believe me?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No, I never said that...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Then we're good. Tell me where you want to go, and I'll take you there.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Let me think...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It'll almost be noon by the time we get down the mountain, and I haven't even had breakfast yet.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: You got any recommendations for a good fondue place?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: A what place?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You've never heard of fondue?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Are you even from Kjerag?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: One of us is from Kjerag, and it's not you.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Of course I know fondue, but only city folk eat it. My roast meat and sausages at home are so much better.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But all the Columbian guidebooks list fondue as one of the top ten foods you have to try before you die!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Pfft, you Columbians know nothing about food. The best cuisine in Kjerag is wild game from the mountains.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What's your plan, then?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We don't have enough time to hunt, and I don't have much in store to spare.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But hunters who live on the mountains always save some game. We can join them for lunch, if we leave now.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Don't worry, everyone's really nice and pious.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: My fondue...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: You can get that anytime!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We'll go into the city tonight. Come.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Wait up—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...Promise me you'll walk slower, and I'll go with you!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We finally reached the bottom of the mountain. Look this way, Elena.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I didn't come to have a snowball fight with you!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: What are you talking about? It's a Kjerag tradition to paint the forehead with snow and pray for Kjeragandr's protection.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I wouldn't describe what you just did as 'paint'.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Close enough. We don't really care for ceremony here in Kjerag.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You can't fool me! I'm sure all those books in the Hall of Writings—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Now let me get the right side of your forehead.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Joanna—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Haha!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Get back here!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Whoaaaaaaa—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Hold on tight, Elena, or you're gonna get thrown from the sled.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Is this why you prayed for Kjeragandr to protect the two of us? For this crazy ride through the forest on this run-down wooden sled—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: (Purrs)
attributes.name: Rift Cloudbeast

attributes.content: Two of us plus the Rift Cloudbeast!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: What are you calling 'run-down wooden sled'? So many people who want to ride the sleds of Kjerag don't get the chance!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Let's go even faster! It'll feel really good!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Whoaaa—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Whew—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Good to have a nice sunny day like this after the disaster. The Rift Cloudbeast looks much happier.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: (Purrs)
attributes.name: Rift Cloudbeast

attributes.content: ...Elena? What's the matter? Keep up!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: How am I... supposed to... keep up... when you're... faster than a fowlbeast *cough* *cough*—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Tired too soon? But we climbed Mount Karlan together.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: That's because... E-Enya stopped to wait for me from time to time! But you *cough* *cough*—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I'm supposed to be going out for lunch, not for a hike...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Well, you can sit a little while. I can wait.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: *pant* H-How long do we have to go...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Almost there.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Over this hill, and then we're only half an hour from finding someone.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Whoa!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The Rift Cloudbeast climbs onto Elena's shoulder, like it did back on Mount Karlan.
It does not realize that it would be the last straw that 'breaks' the scientist.
Oh... R-Rift Cloudbeast—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Joanna and her pet look at each other in stunned silence at the sight of Elena lying motionless on the ground.
L-Look what you've done!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You killed a Rhine Lab researcher!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: (Purrs)
attributes.name: Rift Cloudbeast

attributes.content: Y-You're right! Elena isn't dead! We've made it through worse. She even saw Kjeragandr with her own eyes!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Elena? Are you alright? Please don't be dead!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: If you die—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: She's moving!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: *cough* *cough*—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: She's sweating all over and coughing up foam... her lips are blue too...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What do I do, what do I do... are Columbians this weak? I've never seen this happen to someone from Kjerag...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...I-I'll find help right now!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Joanna crouches down and lifts Elena violently by her clothes. She slings Elena over her shoulders and locks Elena's arms and legs with her own.
Heave, ho—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Hang in there, Elena!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You might as well put me out of my misery with a bolt if you're gonna carry me like this...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I think I'm really going to die now...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: She forces out her last words, and closes her eyes...
'Alright, Genne, I know you like to listen to Dad's stories about the stars, but it's time to go to bed.'
'You want to see the stars outdoors? You're too little right now, but when you grow up, we'll climb the highest mountains and see all the stars, okay?'
'No, we're not taking you for a ride. Someday, you'll go to bed with a smile on your face under the starry firmament.'
'After all, your name means 'origin of stars'...'
She's awake!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Where am I...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: A clinic in the mountains. This doctor saved your life.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Thank... you...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: She's exaggerating. The concoction will only soothe your symptoms. You need to rest.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: What's she sick with, doctor?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Foreigners have a hard time with Kjerag's high mountains.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: While the symptoms may not be obvious in everyday life, Elena was clearly overexerted and exhausted when she was brought in, causing the symptoms to intensify.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: I'm so sorry, Elena! Come on, Rift Cloudbeast, let's apologize together!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: (Purrs)
attributes.name: Rift Cloudbeast

attributes.content: It's alright, I know you didn't mean any harm.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Let me get up—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Elena stumbles as she tries to get out of bed. Joanna quickly moves to help her up.
By Kjeragandr, just stay put!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I'm fine...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: No need to worry. She'll get better soon.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: ...I'm glad there's a clinic up here. I thought the snowy mountains were gonna be the last thing I'd ever see.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It's not easy for the hunters to go down the mountains, so they asked the Vine-Bead Court to send a doctor.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: I was studying medicine at the Hall of Writings, so Elder Adso sent me. That was more than a decade ago.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Ever since Karlan Trade opened new hospitals in the cities, though, people have started to go there instead, even though it's further away, so things have gotten quieter here.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Doctor...
Oh, sorry, Mia. So busy I forgot about you.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Did the new stomach medicine work better?
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: No, doctor. My belly still hurts...
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: Hm, that's unusual. Did you get it checked in the city?
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: I don't trust the city people... so many have taken their chemical stuff and gotten sick in other ways.
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: Hm... well, take a seat, and I'll look through the books to see if there's something else that can be done.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: ...Maybe I can help.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I have a sonograph with me. It can be used to perform basic scans on human organs.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But that's city-folk stuff, isn't it?
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: Does it matter? It's not like you have anything to lose.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Forget it... never seen anything like this before...
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: Come on, Elena, help me convince her—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Elena?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What I mean is, it's not city-folk stuff.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It's an instrument that 'She' has blessed.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Her words surprise even herself. She was not supposed to subscribe to such mysticism.
My, my...
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: You mean... Kjeragandr?
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I had the honor of traveling together with the Saintess for a while. This instrument allowed me to see Her true form.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: You know, of course, that She does not reveal herself easily. It stands to reason that She must have permitted this instrument to perceive Her.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: She winks at the huntress next to her.
...She's telling the truth.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We're the Saintess's servants. We accompanied her when she sought an audience with Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Yes, yes, the Saintess...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I do remember hearing people say that the Saintess was accompanied by two attendants when she came back, one of whom was a foreigner...
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: Where did you see Her, then? What did She say to you?
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: She said—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: (Whisper) What DID She say?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: 'Seek not my temple, but my heart.'
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We are all ignorant children in Her presence... before the mysteries of this great land.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: True ignorance is to lack the courage to venture into the unknown beyond one's own beliefs.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I see...
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: I-I'll trust you. What should I do?
attributes.name: Kjerag Woman

attributes.content: Please take off your jacket. I'll get ready.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Phew... thank you so much. Without you, I would never have realized that she had developed gallstones.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: But... she refused to go to a hospital for treatment, even though she agreed to let me examine her.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I'll talk to Mia again when she comes back for her medicine next time.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: It's not something that can be easily treated with pharmaceuticals alone. I wish I had tried harder to convince her...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...Mia's a smart woman. She may not have necessarily believed what you said about the instrument being blessed, but she agreed to be examined. That was the furthest she could accept, right now.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: The smarter someone is, the more likely they'll be stubborn about their views. So their prejudices go way deeper than other people's.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: It's so hard to change one's prejudices, without seeing certain things for oneself.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: ...Have you had a lot of experiences like this?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Yes. I didn't like the new things that Karlan Trade brought in at first, but I have to admit their usefulness when I see them in action, like today.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: It's the other way round now. Quite a few people seem to have a prejudice against me, thinking that the old stuff from the past is all myths and lies. Nothing I can do about it.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Perhaps someday, they'll see the good in those old things, and realize their narrow-mindedness, haha.
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Anyway, I should thank you on Mia's behalf. It's getting dark. How about you two stay for dinner?
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Dinner? What do you have?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Mm... some vegetables, and two smoked sausages—
attributes.name: Kjerag Doctor

attributes.content: Wow! Did you hear that, Elena? We're in for a treat!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Elena takes a stroll outside the clinic after dinner. She can faintly hear Joanna and the doctor chatting around the dinner table.
The stars of Kjerag...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: She rubs her hands together. The white vapors that come out as she exhales fade into the night in the wind. She walks forward slowly, toward the starry heavens that she can almost reach out and touch.
Good news! I finally got the doctor to agree to roast the last half of the sausage!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Have a little bit later, and then you can take the rest back with you when I bring you back to the station.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Why aren't you saying anything, Elena? Are you feeling sick again?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...Oh, no, I'm just thinking.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: About what? This sky? You've been looking up at it for a while.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Yeah... I've never seen the stars so clearly with the naked eye.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I've looked up at them all my life. Didn't think they were anything special.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: My family, the Urbicas, has a long tradition of astrology.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I don't get along with my parents anymore, but they used to watch the stars with me, using telescopes.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But the stars were always so dim when I pulled open the curtains and looked out at the night sky outside the window. My parents couldn't explain why; they just told me that you can't see the stars as clearly in the cities as you can out in the wilderness, on the mountains.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The question planted itself in my heart like a seed. I was frustrated with my ignorance, at the lack of answers...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: It was only when I grew up and read about light pollution and atmospheric turbulence in the library that I found the answer.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...I don't know much about the stars, but sometimes being ignorant isn't such a bad thing.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: If you didn't think you were ignorant, you wouldn't have gone to the library to find the answer.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You're right.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Did your parents ever tell you why they liked to look at the stars? That 'astrology' thing?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: It's not a question of like or not. It's my family's tradition.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Hunting and sculpting are my family's tradition, but I don't think my ancestors would have carried it on for so long if they didn't like it...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...I remember now. My mother told me something that my ancestors once said.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: 'Beauty and the unknown.' Beauty makes people gaze into the unknown, and the unknown makes people feel a deeper beauty.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Maybe that's why they started stargazing...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Well... I'm not sure I understood it, but it sounded like the clerics reciting the Kjeragandr, so I guess that's not a bad thing.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Anyway, it's time for us to go down. I'll go wrap up that sausage for you.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Okay.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...Thanks, Joanna.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Had fun today, Elena? You were the last one to come back.
attributes.name: Local Researcher

attributes.content: Well, it was a long day. It did end up being fun, I guess?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The receptionist said there's a guest here looking for you. Said you hadn't been writing back, and they're not leaving until they see your face.
attributes.name: Local Researcher

attributes.content: They're in the reception room.
attributes.name: Local Researcher

attributes.content: A guest? For me?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I'll go now.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Hey, is that... smoked wild game sausage I smell?!
attributes.name: Local Researcher

attributes.content: You like this? My guide friend said Kjerag locals like it more than fondue.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Probably a tradition thing? I grew up in a poor family, and I would be overjoyed when we got smoked sausage. I prefer fondue now, though.
attributes.name: Local Researcher

attributes.content: So... could I have a bit of the sausage?
attributes.name: Local Researcher

attributes.content: I see... I'm not hungry yet. I'll go see the guest; you can help yourself.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...I knew it.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Genne...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: So glad you're alright...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Sia...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I've been sending letters ever since the Catastrophe, trying to make sure that you're alright.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Then I heard that there was a skirmish between Kjerag and Victoria, and I got even more anxious...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Mm... there was a suspension of incoming mail that only recently got lifted.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Were you hurt? Sick? Is everything okay?
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Well... a lot happened. Maybe I changed a little bit...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But I'm doing fine. Everything that's fine...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: No need to worry.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Good to hear that...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: I brought your favorite coffee beans from Columbia. The same kind that our favorite breakfast place in Trimounts uses.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: And a hand-grinder, too. It's a little late for coffee, but if you want—
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Yes! I haven't had good coffee in a long while since I came to Kjerag.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Heh, give me a minute.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Did you come from Columbia? I thought you spend most of your time on Rhodes Island?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: A lot's happened to Rhodes Island lately. We can talk about that later...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Anyway, I went home after the events at Rhodes Island. Mother fell sick around the same time that the Catastrophe hit Kjerag, so I stayed a few more days and took turns with father to care for her.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: I tried to tell them about what you're doing in Kjerag, but it didn't take long for father's expression to grow dark. He told me through clenched teeth that he didn't want to hear your name.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: I knew it.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: And then I found out that he had been buying a few different newspapers, and trying to keep it a secret from me.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: I thought he didn't like to read the news.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Because Kjerag was all over the news those few days...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: He took the newspapers into mother's room, talking as he flipped through them... they hugged, and his eyes were red as he left the room.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Maybe he's just getting old... he and mother want to know more about you, Genne.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Sia, you know I... they...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I'm not here to lobby for them. You know I'm on your side, and I know what they did to you.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: But if one day, they ask me about you... can I tell them?
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: ...Is mother alright?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Just a bout of flu that hit harder than usual. She had recovered by the time I left.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: She wouldn't let herself show any weakness. She was back to her stone-faced self the first day her fever faded.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Hmph... good to hear, I guess.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Do you still carry your astrology notes with you, Sia?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Yeah. Why do you ask?
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: ...I want to take a look.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I thought you didn't like astrology.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: I... I saw the 'god' of the Kjerag when I was investigating the Kjerag Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: At first, I thought all this talk about 'god' was just a load of hot air, and I was frustrated that my companions believed in the existence of a 'god', even though the most rational explanation was an Originium vein.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Until I walked into the cave... and saw biosignals on my instruments.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: When the word 'Feranmut' came to my mind, I realized that my research wasn't so different from our family astrology, after all.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: That irredeemable asshole, Mr. Urbica, father...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I started to understand him, just a little.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: You don't need to reject the path you chose, Genne...
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: No, no, it's not that.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I revealed a glimpse of the truth, the secret behind the veil. I won't stop there.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I continue to believe that science is the best way to explore the unknown, and the path that I'm meant to walk.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Our ancestors may have gone down the wrong path, but it doesn't mean what they did was meaningless.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But... they never got the chance to see the stars in Kjerag. And so, it's our turn to continue this journey of exploration that goes on and on.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I see.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: Do what you want to do, Genne. I'll have your back, always.
attributes.name: Astesia

attributes.content: What—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Why do you look so surprised? Am I not allowed here?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...The Director told me the local volunteer guide would only come along the first day.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I'm just here to hang out with my friends from afar. No need to follow their rules.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What do you say, Rift Cloudbeast?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: (Purrs)
attributes.name: Rift Cloudbeast

attributes.content: I guess you're right...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Alright, but I'm only coming with you if you agree to two things.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: You got it. What are they?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: First, we'll not run all over the mountains again!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Second... let's go down the mountain and have some fondue.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I told you, that stuff's—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Nope, I want to try it for myself before judging whether it's good or not.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Alright, alright...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Let's go.
attributes.name: Joanna
